_source: Mirrors AIAT API GET /gallery. Drop new event entries here during bootcamp.

_field_docs.id: string — UUID or slug, must be unique
_field_docs.title: string — event name, e.g. 'Hackathon 01 — RAG Sprint'
_field_docs.date: string — ISO date 'YYYY-MM-DD' or display string like '2026 · May'
